findings.source_file: pcb_OPL_Kicad_Library-master_Grove Vision AI V2 Library_Grove - Vision AI Module V2.kicad_sch.json
findings.summary: Grove Vision AI V2 module (112 components). Regulators (2 DCDC + 1 LDO), feedback networks, protection devices, voltage dividers, crystal all correctly detected. Issue: gate_driver_ics for Q4 lists unrelated ICs (U1 processor, U3 LDO) — should only include ICs with outputs connected to gate net. Q4 gate reportedly on VCC_3V3 rail warrants verification.

correct.description: 2 feedback networks correctly identified: U6/U4 SY80004DQD DCDC converters with R33/R34 and R16/R26 dividers (ratio 0.180, Vout≈3.3V)
U3 WR0331-18FF4R LDO (3.3V→1.8V) correctly detected with fixed output from part suffix
4 ESD protection diodes (D5-D8, DF2S6.8FS) correctly identified protecting SPI bus pins
X1 24MHz crystal with C14/C15 (12pF) load caps correctly detected, effective load 9pF
2 RC filters on reset circuit (R7/C3 1.59kHz, R7/C16 72.34Hz) correctly identified

incorrect.description: Q4 gate_driver_ics contains unrelated ICs (U1 processor, U3 LDO, U5 memory) — should only list ICs with output pins connected to gate net

suggestions: Refine gate_driver_ic detection to only include ICs whose output pins are directly connected to the transistor gate net
findings.project: pcb_OPL_Kicad_Library-master_Grove Vision AI V2 Library_Grove - Vision AI Module V2
